title: Physics-anchored validation reveals limits of infrastructure hazard machine learning
description: Reproducibility package with deterministic analysis scripts, derived outputs, provenance records, sensitivity checks, and publication figure sources for a study of physics-anchored grouped validation and conformal decision reliability in infrastructure hazard machine learning.

creators.name: REN, Lijian
creators.affiliation: School of Civil Engineering, Inner Mongolia University of Technology; Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region Key Laboratory of Green Construction and Intelligent Operation and Maintenance of Civil Engineering; College of Civil and Transportation Engineering, Hohai University
